tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
Artist: Ke$ha
Song: Tik Tok
Album: Animal


Capo 3


[tab][ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]
Wake up in the morning feeling like P. Diddy[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                             [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Bm[/ch]
Put my glasses on, I’m out the door I’m gonna hit this city[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                     [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]Bm[/ch]
Before I leave, brush my teeth with a bottle of Jack[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                         N.C.
Cause when I leave for the night, I ain’t coming back[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I’m talking pedicure on our toes, toes[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]             [ch]Bm[/ch]
Trying on all our clothes, clothes[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                  [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]                         
Boys blowin' up our phones, phones      drop-topin'[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]           
Playing our favorite cds[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]             [ch]Bm[/ch]
Pulling up to the parties[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Trying to get a little bit tipsy[/tab]

Chorus:
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]Bm[/ch]
Don’t stop, make it pop, DJ blow my speakers up[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]       
Tonight, I’mma fight ‘til we see the sunlight[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                               [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]
Tick tock, on the clock But the party don’t stop, no[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Woah oh oh oh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
Woah oh oh oh[/tab]

Chorus

[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]Bm[/ch]
Ain't got a care in world, but got plenty of beer[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]
Ain't got no money in my pocket, but I'm already here[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]Bm[/ch]
And now, the dudes are linin' up cause they hear we got swagger[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                                N.C.
But we kick 'em to the curb unless they look like Mick Jagger[/tab]

[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]
I'm talking about everybody getting crunk, crunk[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                    [ch]Bm[/ch]
Boys tryin' to touch my junk, junk[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]                                        [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]
Gonna smack him if he getting too drunk, drunk      now, now[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]
We go until they kick us out, out[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]Bm[/ch]
Or the police shut us down, down[/tab]

Police shut us down, down
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
Po-po shut us[/tab]

Chorus x2

[tab] [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]Bm[/ch]
DJ, you build me up you break me down [/tab]
[tab]             [ch]A[/ch]
My heart, it pounds yeah, you got me[/tab]

You got that sound, yeah, you got me[/tab]
